title: Old Ashram Builds Delhi's Newest AI Lab
description: New Delhi [India], March 16: When a phone can write a job application, explain a textbook in Hindi, help a shopkeeper calculate GST, or tell a farmer today's crop price in real time, the technology doing all of that is artificial intelligence. Most of the tools that make this possible are free. The only thing most Indians have lacked is someone to show them how. On 15 March 2026, a lab opened in South Delhi with the specific purpose of closing that gap.

title: Indian-origin Engineer Aman Gottumukkala joins xAI, Musk welcomes him to the team
description: Indian-origin software engineer Aman Gottumukkala, founder of AI coding startup Firebender, has joined Elon Musk’s artificial intelligence company xAI. Musk welcomed him to the team after Gottumukkala announced he would work on advanced coding AI systems to automate software development.
content:
An Indian-origin software engineer and startup founder, Aman Gottumukkala, has joined xAI, the artificial intelligence firm founded by Elon Musk, to work on advanced AI systems designed to automate software development.

title: Taiwan tech giant Foxconn posts 24% jump in annual net profit
description: The booming market for artificial intelligence servers brought Taiwan's Foxconn a 24 percent jump in annual net profit, the company said
content:
The booming market for artificial intelligence servers brought Taiwan's Foxconn a 24 percent jump in annual net profit, the company said Monday, forecasting continued strong demand for the hardware.

title: Free event to help local businesses build skills in AI and cybersecurity
description: Businesses across the Midlands are invited to a free event showcasing funded training opportunities designed to help organisations build skills in the fast-growing areas of artificial intelligence, cybersecurity and digital technology.
content:
Hosted by North Warwickshire and South Leicestershire College (NWSLC) the “Navigating AI & Cybersecurity with CompTIA” event will take place on Thursday (March 19), 10am to 1pm, at the MIRA Technology Institute in Nuneaton.

title: South Korea in early talks with Anthropic on AI cooperation
description: South Korea has held early talks with Anthropic, developer of the Claude AI model, as Seoul looks to broaden its engagement with major global artificial intelligence companies beyond OpenAI, according to the Ministry of Science and ICT.

title: AI vs jobs: Atlassian India employee got promoted and fired within 24 hours
description: An Atlassian India employee was reportedly promoted and laid off within hours, as the company announced plans to cut 1,600 jobs globally while shifting focus to artificial intelligence.

title: China Eyes Smarter Tax Enforcement Through AI and Structured Risk Analysis
description: China is working with the International Monetary Fund to strengthen tax compliance monitoring by adopting structured risk assessment methods using big data, artificial intelligence, and improved governance. The initiative aims to help the State Taxation Administration identify high-risk taxpayers more effectively and modernize the country’s tax administration system.
content: China is strengthening its tax monitoring system as authorities explore more structured, technology-driven approaches to risk assessment. A recent technical assistance study by the International Monetary Fund’s Fiscal Affairs Department, prepared by ... [5501 chars]
